flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Laurel Business Institute rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.0k → $13.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Laurel Business Institute rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $12.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Laurel Business Institute fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (310 → 263).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Laurel Business Institute rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.5k → $8.6k).
